PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?ruler ?rulerLabel ?startDate WHERE {
  {
    wd:Q1016 p:P1344 ?statement .
    ?statement ps:P1344 ?ruler .
    ?statement pq:P580 ?startDate
  } UNION {
    wd:Q1016 p:P35 ?statement .
    ?statement ps:P35 ?ruler .
    ?statement pq:P580 ?startDate
  }
  ?ruler rdfs:label ?rulerLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?rulerLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(?startDate >= "1951-12-24T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
}
ORDER BY ?startDate
